## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 125, Firefox 126]
- MONO Version: [e.g. 0.1.0]

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or console errors.
